title: St Marks Basilica
one_comment:
jmlwinder: Such a fabulous scene--great shot, Jonathan. 👍👍
I remember being in about this same spot on a visit back in the 1970s, but my memory is in black and white. 😄 I don't know why I don't have a Kodachrome slide of this in my archives but I sure don't.  Foolishness of youth.  Or, I pitched it out when I edited down the slide archive, thinking "Venice ain't going anywhere, we can always go back and re-shoot this".  Foolishness of middle age.  :-)
